kits.name: Myrmidon
kits.benefits: Specializes in a single weapon gaining +1 bonus at 3rd level, +2 at 6th, +3 at 9th, +4 at 12th, +5 at 15th. Weapon specialization provides bonuses to attack rolls, damage rolls, and can grant additional attacks.
kits.restrictions: Must specialize in single weapon choice and cannot effectively use other weapons. Must pledge loyalty to a cause, lord, or organization. Loss of weapon specialty causes severe combat penalty.
kits.specialAbilities: Weapon specialization with progressive bonuses; can spend proficiency slots to advance specialization to mastery

kitTraits.text: Specializes in a single weapon gaining +1 bonus at 3rd level, +2 at 6th, +3 at 9th, +4 at 12th, +5 at 15th. Weapon specialization provides bonuses to attack rolls, damage rolls, and can grant additional attacks.

kits.name: Swashbuckler
kits.benefits: When unarmored or in leather receives +1 to AC. Can perform acrobatic maneuvers like swinging from ropes, vaulting over obstacles, and theatrical combat moves. Natural charisma gains +1 bonus.
kits.restrictions: Cannot wear armor heavier than chain mail or shields. Chaotic or neutral alignment required. Must maintain swashbuckling persona and avoid heavy, cumbersome tactics.
kits.specialAbilities: Acrobatics, enhanced climbing, showmanship, dramatic combat techniques

kitTraits.text: When unarmored or in leather receives +1 to AC. Can perform acrobatic maneuvers like swinging from ropes, vaulting over obstacles, and theatrical combat moves. Natural charisma gains +1 bonus.

kits.name: Gladiator
kits.benefits: Receives bonus proficiency slot and +1 HP per level for crowd appeal. Master of exotic crowd-pleasing weapons (scimitars, tridents, nets). +2 morale bonus when fighting before audience. Can feint opponent for AC bonus.
kits.restrictions: Often indebted or enslaved, fighting in arenas for entertainment. Cannot refuse fights when prestige is at stake. Must maintain public image and combat reputation.
kits.specialAbilities: Performance combat, weapon expertise (exotic), feinting, crowd manipulation

kits.name: Cavalier
kits.benefits: Mounted combat expertise grants +1 AC when on horseback, +2 to mounted melee attack rolls, and +2 damage when charging. Loyalty to order provides divine protection (as if blessed). Extra horse handling and animal mastery proficiencies.
kits.restrictions: Must belong to knightly order or similar organization and maintain its code. Cannot retreat from honorable challenge without shame and level penalties. Requires maintenance of warhorse and equipment.
kits.specialAbilities: Superior horsemanship, warhorse bond, divine protection, jousting expertise

kits.name: Berserker
kits.benefits: Can enter berserk state for limited rounds per day (equal to CON bonus). While berserk: +2 attack rolls, +3 damage, +10% HP temporarily, ignores pain and fatigue. Tremor sense detects vibrations from 30 feet away.
kits.restrictions: Cannot wear heavy plate armor (chain mail and lighter only). Must have chaotic alignment. While berserk, cannot distinguish ally from enemy and cannot perform intricate tasks. Post-berserk fatigue.
kits.specialAbilities: Berserk rage, tremor sense, improved damage resistance, temporary HP boost

kits.name: Inquisitor
kits.benefits: Expert at reading body language and tone; can detect lies with a Wisdom check (bonus equal to charisma modifier). Can interrogate prisoners, extract information without torture. Receives +2 to perception checks against evil-doers and heretics.
kits.restrictions: Must be lawful good alignment. Must actively pursue religious heretics and evil-doers. Restricted to church hierarchy decisions and cannot act independently.
kits.specialAbilities: Detect lies, interrogation mastery, perception bonus, religious authority

kitTraits.text: Expert at reading body language and tone; can detect lies with a Wisdom check (bonus equal to charisma modifier). Can interrogate prisoners, extract information without torture. Receives +2 to perception checks against evil-doers and heretics.

kits.name: Cavalier
kits.benefits: Mounted combat mastery grants +1 AC when mounted, +3 damage while charging on horseback, jousting expertise. Can automatically control mount in combat. Receives honor bonus to charisma-based interactions related to knightly service.
kits.restrictions: Must own, maintain, and bond with noble warhorse (magical horse preferred). Cannot refuse righteous challenge from evil foe or rival knight. Oath requires loyalty to crown or church.
kits.specialAbilities: Superior horsemanship, jousting mastery, warhorse bond, chivalric authority

kits.name: Enforcer
kits.benefits: Intimidating presence grants +2 bonus when using intimidation checks and threat displays. Master of tracking and pursuit (can follow track up to 7 days old). Divine authority to pursue wrongdoers across lands. Receives backing of legal authority in settlements.
kits.restrictions: Must serve a legal authority (king, church, lord, or law enforcement organization). Cannot show mercy to known criminals or heretics. Must bring criminals to justice rather than execute privately.
kits.specialAbilities: Intimidation mastery, tracking expertise, legal authority, divine warrant

kits.name: Archer
kits.benefits: Specialized in ranged combat with bows/crossbows receiving +1 attack bonus and +2 damage. Can rapid-fire (shoot multiple times) as bonus action at +2 penalty to AC. Called shots allow targeting specific body parts for special effects.
kits.restrictions: Must focus proficiencies on missile weapons and archery techniques. Cannot effectively use melee weapons (suffer -2 penalty). Must maintain bow and ammunition supply.
kits.specialAbilities: Rapid fire, called shots, arrow trick shots, extended range

kits.name: Beastmaster
kits.benefits: Can communicate with and mentally direct a bonded animal companion (wolf, bear, eagle, etc.). Animal gains experience and levels alongside ranger. Telepathic link allows coordination in battle. Animal's senses enhance ranger capabilities (scent, sight, hearing bonuses).
kits.restrictions: Must have active animal companion at all times. If animal dies, ranger suffers level drain and must complete dangerous ritual to gain new companion. Animal loyalty depends on ranger treatment.
kits.specialAbilities: Animal communication, telepathic bond, animal training mastery

kitTraits.text: Can communicate with and mentally direct a bonded animal companion (wolf, bear, eagle, etc.). Animal gains experience and levels alongside ranger. Telepathic link allows coordination in battle. Animal's senses enhance ranger capabilities (scent, sight, hearing bonuses).

kits.name: Mountain Man
kits.benefits: Expert mountaineer with +3 bonus to climbing and mountain survival checks. Can navigate treacherous terrain at normal speed. Never suffers penalties for climbing in bad weather. Resistance to cold and altitude effects. Can predict mountain storms.
kits.restrictions: Most effective in mountainous terrain; effectiveness reduced in other environments by 50%. Must dedicate ranger abilities to mountain region protection. Often becomes isolated from civilization.
kits.specialAbilities: Mountain climbing expertise, altitude mastery, weather prediction, survival bonuses

kits.name: Stalker
kits.benefits: Master of stealth and ambush tactics with bonuses to Hide in Shadows and Move Silently equal to ranger level (instead of half-level). Can remain hidden while moving. Ambush attacks gain surprise round regardless of enemy perception. Backstab damage increases by weapon die size.
kits.restrictions: Often operates alone for extended periods with minimal social interaction. Cannot effectively lead large groups. Must avoid direct confrontation when possible. Chaotic alignment recommended.
kits.specialAbilities: Hide in shadows, move silently mastery, ambush tactics, backstab enhancement

kits.name: Healer
kits.benefits: All healing magic is enhanced: +1 caster level for curative spells (Cure Light/Serious/Critical), +2 HP healed per die. Lay on Hands healing increases to 2 HP per level per day. Can identify diseases and poisons by touch. Regeneration assistance available.
kits.restrictions: Must be good-aligned. Pacifist tendencies discourage offensive combat; takes -2 penalty when attacking living creatures. Cannot use weapons that deal unnecessary suffering. Sworn oath to heal all who request aid.
kits.specialAbilities: Enhanced healing, disease identification, poison treatment, lay on hands mastery

kitTraits.text: All healing magic is enhanced: +1 caster level for curative spells (Cure Light/Serious/Critical), +2 HP healed per die. Lay on Hands healing increases to 2 HP per level per day. Can identify diseases and poisons by touch. Regeneration assistance available.

kits.name: Warrior Priest
kits.benefits: Can use edged weapons (swords, axes, scimitars). THAC0 improves by 1 (as Fighter gains). Combat blessing grants +1 attack and damage in first round of blessed melee. Battle magic combines spellcasting with melee in same round.
kits.restrictions: Must serve war/battle deity requiring aggressive expansion of faith. Maintains militant attitude and cannot show cowardice. Must tithe portion of battle winnings to church.
kits.specialAbilities: Edged weapon mastery, combat blessing, battle magic, turn undead in combat

kits.name: Scholar
kits.benefits: Receives 3 bonus languages and lore knowledge in religious history, theology, and philosophy. Can read/decipher ancient religious texts and dead languages (+2 bonus). Access to restricted church libraries. Uses intelligence modifier for deity spellcasting (instead of wisdom).
kits.restrictions: Less combat-focused; takes -2 penalty to armor class and AC calculations. Cannot lead combat effectively. Often cloistered in libraries and monasteries. Must contribute knowledge to church records.
kits.specialAbilities: Language mastery, ancient text reading, theological knowledge, research expertise

kits.name: Shapeshifter
kits.benefits: Can assume animal forms more frequently (additional times per day equal to druid level divided by 2). Shape changes between humanoid and animal forms without time penalty. Can shapeshift mid-combat without triggering attacks of opportunity.
kits.restrictions: Must maintain balance of nature through environmental stewardship. Cannot assist civilized expansion or destroy natural habitats. Animal forms must be druids' circle restricted selection.
kits.specialAbilities: Enhanced shapeshift frequency, combat transformation, animal form switching

kits.name: Totemic Druid
kits.benefits: Bonded to specific animal totem (wolf, bear, eagle, raven, etc.) providing spiritual connection and partial abilities even outside shapeshift form. Gains totem animal's instincts, senses, and some physical features. Can command totem animals in region.
kits.restrictions: Must maintain sacred relationship with totem spirit through regular rituals and respect. Cannot hunt totem species or allow them to be hunted. Totem form restricted; cannot shapeshift into other animals effectively.
kits.specialAbilities: Totem spirit communication, partial transformation, animal command, spiritual guidance

kitTraits.text: Bonded to specific animal totem (wolf, bear, eagle, raven, etc.) providing spiritual connection and partial abilities even outside shapeshift form. Gains totem animal's instincts, senses, and some physical features. Can command totem animals in region.

kits.name: Swashbuckler
kits.benefits: Acrobatic finesse provides +1 AC when unarmored (cumulative with thief AC bonuses). Can perform flashy combat moves (flips, disarms, trips) using Dexterity bonus. Charisma checks gain +1 bonus when performing dangerous stunts. Can swing/vault across combat areas.
kits.restrictions: Cannot wear armor heavier than leather (no shields). Must maintain theatrical and confident persona. Often becomes showman rather than serious combatant. Needs support of admirers or patronage.
kits.specialAbilities: Combat acrobatics, disarm mastery, vaulting maneuvers, crowd appeal

kits.name: Investigator
kits.benefits: Expert at gathering information and solving mysteries with +2 bonus to investigation checks. Can read body language and detect lies (as paladin ability). Access to underworld information network. Can assume disguises and false identities (+2 disguise checks).
kits.restrictions: Often works with law enforcement or guilds limiting independence. Must report findings to employer/authority. Cannot use skills against patron or employer without consequence.
kits.specialAbilities: Investigation mastery, lie detection, disguise expertise, information gathering

kits.name: Acrobat
kits.benefits: Exceptional climbing, balancing, and tumbling abilities with +3 bonus. Can walk tightropes, narrow ledges, and unstable terrain at normal movement speed. Falling distance before damage reduced by half (minimum 5 feet). Can bounce off surfaces to reach otherwise inaccessible areas.
kits.restrictions: Must remain lightly equipped and unencumbered (cannot carry more than leather armor weight in gear). Cannot wear armor or carry heavy weapons. Height phobias contraindicate high-altitude work.
kits.specialAbilities: Tightrope walking, tumbling expertise, wall-running, fall damage reduction

kits.name: Beggar
kits.benefits: Expert at blending into crowds and gathering street information. Can assume convincing beggar disguise becoming nearly invisible to authorities. Receives +2 bonus gathering information from lower classes. Access to homeless network in cities for intelligence gathering.
kits.restrictions: Must maintain impoverished appearance in public (cannot display wealth ostentatiously). Restricted from noble areas and upper-class establishments without excellent disguise. Social restrictions limit legitimate work opportunities.
kits.specialAbilities: Crowd blending, street information network, beggar disguise mastery, social camouflage

kits.name: Gallant
kits.benefits: Charming and brave demeanor grants +1 bonus to charisma-based checks and diplomacy. Inspires courage in nearby allies (+1 morale bonus to attack/saves) when bard performs. Can negotiate with enemies gaining cease-fire negotiations. Performance grants temporary morale HP to allies.
kits.restrictions: Must be bold and flamboyant in appearance and personality. Cannot hide or be inconspicuous socially. Must maintain reputation for bravery or lose inspiration ability. Chaotic or neutral alignment preferred.
kits.specialAbilities: Inspire courage, diplomatic negotiation, morale enhancement, heroic persona

kits.name: Blade
kits.benefits: More combat-focused than traditional bard: receives +1 THAC0 (as skilled fighter), improved weapon proficiency options, can specialize in single weapon (+1 damage). Combat inspiration grants +1 attack and damage in first melee round after bardic performance.
kits.restrictions: Less emphasis on spellcasting and magic. Takes penalty to learn spells above 4th level. Must maintain warrior reputation. Often relies on blade rather than wit.
kits.specialAbilities: Weapon specialization, combat inspiration, improved THAC0, dueling expertise

kits.name: Skald
kits.benefits: Warrior-poet and historian recording history through song and sagas. Receives +2 bonus to historical knowledge and lore checks. Battle songs inspire warriors (+2 morale bonus instead of +1). Can recall specific historical events with perfect accuracy. Allies gain advantage when bard sings applicable battle song.
kits.restrictions: Must preserve oral traditions and historical accuracy (cannot lie about past events). Must spend significant time teaching and preserving knowledge. Often becomes bound to noble court as official historian.
kits.specialAbilities: Historical mastery, powerful battle songs, lore expertise, morale inspiration

kits.name: Herald
kits.benefits: Messenger and diplomat recognized by nobility and organizations. Receives diplomatic immunity when traveling on official business (+2 reaction bonus from nobility). Can use bard abilities to grant morale to entire armies (100+ soldiers). Official authority to make minor legal proclamations.
kits.restrictions: Must serve a lord, organization, or nobility. Cannot operate independently against employer interests. Must maintain professional demeanor and dress appropriately. Limited to civilized lands where authority is recognized.
kits.specialAbilities: Diplomatic immunity, official authority, mass morale inspiration, noble recognition
